source_pr.title: ddl: speed up the execution time of `ddl test` and `Test Chunk #7 ddl-other`
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
Issue Number: #24459

### What is changed and how it works?

- Move `testIntegrationSuite7` and `testIntegrationSuite8` to `testSerialDBSuite1`  to speed up `Test Chunk #7 ddl-other`. Because `testSerialDBSuite` doesn't be run in `Test Chunk #7 ddl-other`. 

- `testIntegrationSuite3.TestMultiRegionGetTableEndHandle` is duplicated with `testIntegrationSuite7.TestMultiRegionGetTableEndHandle`, so remove it.

- `TestTableDDLWithTimeType` and `TestCreateTableTooLarge` run a long time with race and it just to run error-related tests, so skip to run test with race.

### Related changes

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

| branch |   go test ddl package with race( exec `go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race` locally) |   CI (Race Test Chunk `#7` ddl-other) **in local** 
----------------------------------------------------------- |----------- |----------- |
 |   before this PR(#24704)  |      505s      |      267s  | 
 |   after this PR |      405s      |     199s  | 


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- `No release note`.
